description: Parse a URL-encoded (application/x-www-form-urlencoded) string into a typed object. Useful for processing webhook payloads from services like Mailgun.
label: Parse URL Encoded

options.name: schemaModel
options.label: Schema Model
options.info: Select a model to type the output object. The parsed keys will be mapped to properties of this model.

options.name: result
options.label: As
options.info: The parsed URL-encoded data as a typed object
